creative_brief: Warm overhead shot of a family unpacking a FarmThru bag on a kitchen bench: recognisable whole foods (pork cuts in brown paper, wild-caught fish, farm eggs). Soft natural light, relaxed weekend mood. Small FarmThru logo bottom-right.
primary_text:
When was the last time you bought groceries and actually felt good about it?

Not guilty. Not confused by labels. Just genuinely proud of what you're feeding your family.

That feeling isn't random. It comes from knowing your food's story.

FarmThru connects you directly with farms like Bundarra (pork from real paddocks) and Collins Wild Caught (seafood off the South Coast). No middlemen. No wholesalers. Just honest food from people who grow it.

No commitment. Order when you want. Collect from Brookvale Monday to Friday.

Hundreds of Sydney families already know this feeling. Come find out why.
headline: Ever feel proud buying groceries?
description: Farm-direct groceries from NSW farms you can actually name. Order online, collect from Brookvale.
